---
description: Phase 2 design. Design from approved requirements, let the human decide technical choices, and ask for approval at gate ②.
agent: agent
---

Read the file `.agentloop/prompts/commands/design.md` and execute that procedure exactly. Capability terms (`structured-question`, `notify-and-wait`, `approval-presentation`, `session-compaction`, `role-delegation`) resolve per the capability mapping in `.github/instructions/agentloop.instructions.md`.
